title: T-035 — UI: Brief Create + Brief Convert modals (brief_create_modal + brief_convert_modal)
prompt:
# T-035 — Brief Create + Convert modals

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §9.1, §9.3 + UX brief_create_modal + brief_convert_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:46-86 (brief_create_modal) + 89-140 (brief_convert_modal)

## Goal
Client Component modals for create (template radio + dev_code) and convert (read-only summary + duplicate fa code check + Convert CTA) using shadcn Dialog + RHF + zodResolver.

## Implementation contract
brief-create-modal: RadioGroup for template, Input for dev_code with regex validation, calls createBrief. brief-convert-modal: shows joined brief + fa_defaults via Server Component, debounced fa code availability check via checkFaCodeAvailable, locks brief on success via convertBriefToFa.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/brief-create-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/brief-convert-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/__tests__/brief-create-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/__tests__/brief-convert-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/check-fa-code-available.ts [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given brief create modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:46-86 (brief_create_modal), then it has same 2 fields (template RadioGroup + Dev_Code Input) and same Cancel/Create buttons, using shadcn Dialog+RadioGroup+Input+Button primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given brief convert modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:89-140 (brief_convert_modal), then it shows the read-only summary table, FA code Input with debounced availability indicator, warning Alert about brief locking, and uses shadcn Dialog+Table+Input+Alert+Button primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist
3. Given user enters duplicate FA code, when checkFaCodeAvailable returns conflict, then FormMessage shows error and Convert disabled

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests covering both parity ACs + duplicate-code disabled state
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test brief-create-modal brief-convert-modal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip debounced availability check
- Do not allow Convert without brief in status='complete'
- Do not bypass zodResolver

pipeline_inputs.description: Two brief modals (Create + Convert) using shadcn Dialog + RHF + Zod + debounced FA code availability check.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity for both modals: structural + visual + interaction. Convert modal includes debounced availability + locking warning. Both modals dismissible.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen cascade UI
Do not implement Brief detail form here (T-034)

Given brief convert modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:89-140, then it shows read-only summary table, FA code Input with debounced availability indicator, warning Alert about brief locking, and uses shadcn Dialog+Table+Input+Alert+Button primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist
Given user enters duplicate FA code, when checkFaCodeAvailable returns conflict, then FormMessage shows error and Convert is disabled
test_strategy: RED: 3 RTL tests covering parity + duplicate-code disabled before components exist
risk_red_lines: Do not skip debounced availability check
Do not allow Convert without brief status='complete'
